new_jobs.title: Network Security Contractual employee
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Network Security Engineer is responsible for protecting and strengthening the organization’s ISP and enterprise network infrastructure with a primary focus on network-level security architecture, routing, and switching environments. This role ensures the secure design, deployment, and operation of core and edge network systems, including firewalls, VPN gateways, routing platforms, and switching infrastructure.
The engineer will work with multi-vendor network security technologies such as Juniper SRX, Huawei, Sophos, and other enterprise security platforms, ensuring secure connectivity, traffic control, and threat prevention across backbone, access, and corporate networks. The role requires strong expertise in network protocols, traffic analysis, and secure network design to support highly available and resilient telecom environments.

Duties and Responsibilities
Design, implement, and maintain network-level security controls across core, distribution, and access layers.
Secure routing and switching infrastructure including BGP, OSPF, MPLS, and VLAN environments.
Configure and manage firewalls, IPS/IDS, and VPN gateways across multi-vendor platforms.
Implement and maintain network segmentation, VRF, VLAN architecture, and secure traffic isolation.
Apply and manage NAT, ACLs, port security, control-plane protection, and secure device management (SSH, AAA, TACACS+/RADIUS).
Support secure integration between ISP backbone, data centers, and enterprise networks.
Network Monitoring & Threat Detection
Monitor network traffic, flows, and logs to detect anomalies, attacks, and performance issues.
Analyze traffic patterns using network monitoring and security tools.
Identify and mitigate DDoS attacks, routing anomalies, and network-based threats.
Collaborate with NOC and security teams to maintain network availability and security posture.
Incident Response & Vulnerability Management
Investigate network security incidents and perform root cause analysis.
Respond to security events affecting routing, switching, and firewall infrastructure.
Conduct network vulnerability assessments and implement remediation measures.
Ensure secure configuration baselines across all network devices.
Policy Enforcement & Compliance
Enforce network security policies, standards, and hardening guidelines.
Ensure compliance with organizational and regulatory security requirements.
Implement secure access control for internal, external, and partner connectivity.
Documentation & Continuous Improvement
Maintain up-to-date network topology diagrams, security architecture documentation, and configuration standards.
Document incidents, mitigation strategies, and lessons learned.
Stay updated on emerging network threats, vulnerabilities, and telecom security practices.

Job Requirements
· Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, Cybersecurity, or a related field.
Certification:
Required: CCNA, CompTIA Security+ (or equivalent)
Preferred: CEH, CCNP Security, JNCIS-SEC, or vendor-specific firewall certifications
Experience:
Minimum of three (3) years of hands-on experience in Network Security Engineering or Network Engineering, preferably within telecommunications or ISP environments.
Technical Skills
Strong knowledge of routing and switching technologies (BGP, OSPF, MPLS, VLANs, STP).
Hands-on experience with Juniper SRX, Huawei, Sophos, or similar enterprise firewalls.
Experience implementing VPN technologies (IPsec, SSL VPN, site-to-site).
Deep understanding of network protocols, traffic flow analysis, and network security controls.
Experience with network monitoring, log analysis, and threat detection tools

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (NSCE-003) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

new_jobs.title: Datacom IP Engineer
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
Installing, configuring, operating and troubleshooting LAN, WAN

Duties and Responsibilities
· Installing, configuring, operating and troubleshooting LAN, WAN.
· Configuring routing protocols, like: RIP, EIGRP, OSPF, IS-IS, BGP.
· Knowledge of static/ default routing.
· Configuring MPLS, VRF, VPLS, VSI.
· Knowledge of VLAN, VLAN types and VLAN usage.
· Familiarity with STP, VTP, VTP Pruning, CDP, LLDP, PPP.
· Having familiarity with PPPOE and Hotspot setups.
· Having knowledge and experience of ISP and DPLC/lease networks.
· Having knowledge of DSL, FTTB and P2MP setups.
· Knowledge of Load balancing protocols, like: VRRP, HSRP, GLBP.
· Configuring Prefix-lists, Route-maps.
· Configuring NAT, PAT.
· Configuring QoS (Quality of Service) for traffic prioritization.
· Configuring and managing different series Switches/Routers of Cisco, Mikrotik, ZTE and Huawei.
· Prepare procedures and technical documentations for network troubleshooting and design.
· Upgrading IOS of different vendor nodes such as, Cisco, Huawei and ZTE routers and switches.
· Taking and restoring backup of nodes.
· Use monitoring tools (PRTG, Zabbix, Cacti, LibreNMS, Pingplotter, The Dude, Nagios, SolarWinds).
· Troubleshooting and fixing customers’ issues.
· Installing and configuring server for different purposes.
· Integrating all Backbone uplinks with the required capacity.
· Troubleshooting the network and network elements with a proper report.
· Security aspect, implement IPSec VPN configuration, GRE, DMVPN, port security.
· In-depth knowledge of Linux/Unix network platform and Firewall.
· Create runbooks and SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures).
· Document network diagrams and configurations.
· Apply security measures (ACLs, anti-spoofing, DDoS mitigation).
· Use tools like Wireshark , Ping , Traceroute , NetFlow , SNMP.
· Manage core and edge network devices.
· Design and deploy system architecture (servers, storage, OS).
· Install and configure operating systems (Linux, Windows Server).
· Apply updates, patches, and configuration changes.
· Implement and manage system-level security (firewalls, antivirus, access controls).
· Set up and manage virtual machines (VMware, Hyper-V, VMware ESXi).
· Install and configure server for different purposes/setups using Linux based OS, Like Linux,
· Support hybrid environments (on-prem + cloud)
· Automate tasks using scripts (Bash, PowerShell, Python).
· Set up server roles: DNS, DHCP, Active Directory, File/Print Services, Web Servers (IIS/Apache).
· Implement and test backup strategies (e.g. Veeam, Acronis, Windows Backup).
· Having knowledge of virtualization, RAID, SAN/NAS.
Desirable Attributes:
· Daily operation activities.
· Desirable Attributes:
· Daily operation activities.
· Daily health check of router/switches.
· Monitor latency, throughput, and IP availability.
· Configure and maintain Mikrotik, Cisco, ZTE and Huawei Routers/Switches.
· Maintain network management i.e. backup / restore.
· Daily monitor and troubleshoot of various routing protocols i.e. Interior Gateway (IGP) and Exterior Gateway (EGP) etc.
· Syslog analysis and alarm management.
· Monitor NMS syslog and troubleshoot the network entities according to syslog alarms.
· Generate various traffic and performance related reports.
· Troubleshooting the network and network elements.
Monitor IOS for critical networks and analysis for further isolation

Job Requirements
داشتن سند تحصیلی حد اقل لیسانس در یکی از رشته های ( کمپیوترساینس یا IT )
تجارب : داشتن ( ۱ ) سال تجربه کاری مرتبط به بست برای لیسانس، ( ۱ ) سال برای ماستر و ( ۱ ) سال برای دوکتورا
مهارت های دیگر :
· داشتن تسلط کامل به یکی از زبانهای رسمی ( پشتو یا دری ) واشنائی ( تحریر وتکلم ) با زبان انگلیسی
· داشتن مهارت در پروگرام های کمپیوتر (Ms. Office)

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (Data IP-W-001) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

new_jobs.title: Content Creator & Social Media Manager
new_jobs.description:
About Ziauddin Kamal Hospital
Ziauddin Kamal Hospital is a 20-bed private healthcare
facility located at the Khushal Khan Dewan Begi Crossroad, PD#5, Kabul,
Afghanistan. We are committed to delivering compassionate, high-quality medical
care to our community. As a growing hospital, we focus on professional ethics,
teamwork, and patient-centered service. To expand our team, we are seeking
qualified and dedicated medical and support staff for multiple full-time
positions with rotating shifts.

Job Description
Job Summary
We are seeking a highly skilled and versatile Content
Creator & Social Media Manager to join our marketing team. This is
a hybrid role requiring a unique blend of creative, technical, and strategic
skills.
The ideal candidate will be responsible for
the end-to-end production of all visual and written content across our digital
platforms. This includes graphic design, video production, copywriting, and
community management. Crucially, this role is fully equipped —the
candidate must possess their own professional-grade hardware (laptop, camera,
lighting, etc.) and software to execute tasks independently from day one.
2. Key Responsibilities
A. Content Creation & Design
·
Conceptualize, design, and produce high-quality static graphics,
carousels, infographics, and animated assets for social media and digital
advertising.
·
Create and edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks,
YouTube Shorts, Facebook) including filming, trimming, color grading, audio
mixing, and motion graphics.
·
Ensure all visual content aligns with brand guidelines and
maintains a cohesive aesthetic.
B. Copywriting & Storytelling
·
Write compelling, engaging, and on-brand captions, headlines,
and scripts that drive audience engagement and conversions.
·
Adapt tone of voice for different platforms (e.g., professional
for LinkedIn, casual for Instagram/TikTok).
·
Proofread and edit all copy to ensure accuracy and grammatical
precision.
C. Social Media Management & Strategy
·
Manage the daily publishing schedule across all social media
channels.
·
Monitor trends, competitor activity, and audience insights to
inform content strategy.
·
Track and report on key performance metrics (reach, engagement,
conversion) and adjust tactics accordingly.
·
Engage with the online community by responding to comments and
messages in a timely manner.

Job Requirements
3. Required Equipment
As this is a fully self-sufficient role, the candidate must own and maintain the following equipment:
· Laptop/Computer: A high-performance machine (Mac or PC) capable of running video editing and design software smoothly (minimum 16GB RAM, dedicated GPU preferred).
· Camera Equipment: A professional-grade camera (DSLR, Mirrorless, or high-end smartphone with professional lenses/stabilization), tripod, and lighting setup.
· Software: Proficiency and licensed access to the Adobe Creative Cloud suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator) or equivalent industry-standard tools (e.g., Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Canva Pro).
4. Qualifications & Requirements
Education & Experience
· Relevant Qualification in in Marketing, Communications, Graphic Design, Film, or a related field (or equivalent professional experience).
· Minimum of 3 years of professional experience in content creation, social media management, or a similar multi-disciplinary creative role.
Technical Skills
· Advanced proficiency in video editing and graphic design software.
· Strong understanding of social media algorithms, best practices, and analytics tools (e.g., Meta Business Suite, Sprout Social, Later).
· Basic knowledge of SEO and keyword research for social copy is a plus.
Soft Skills
· Exceptional storytelling and visual communication skills.
· Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet tight deadlines.
· Highly organized with strong attention to detail.
· Adaptable and open to feedback.
5. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
· Growth in follower count and engagement rate across platforms.
· Quality and consistency of visual assets produced per week.
· Adherence to the content calendar and project deadlines.
· Performance of video content (views, watch time, click-through rates).

Submission Guidelines
7. How to Apply
Interested candidates should submit the following to hospital.ziauddinkamal@gmail.com with the subject line: "Content Creator Application – [Your Name]" :
1. Resume / CV
2. Portfolio / Showreel (must include examples of graphic design, video editing, and social media copy). provide links in CV or Cover letter.
3. A brief cover letter outlining why you are the ideal candidate for this multi-faceted role.

expiring_today.title: Senior Backend Java Developer
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
The Senior Backend Java Developer at AurumPay is responsible for designing, building, and launching scalable backend services, FinTech solutions, and API integrations. This role connects AurumPay’s core systems with third-party services such as mobile operators, e-money providers, and digital wallets, focusing on secure, high-performance server-side logic.Key Responsibilities:

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Backend Development & Innovation
• Lead backend development for FinTech projects including digital wallets, payment engines, and automation tools.
• Propose and prototype new features to improve system performance and reliability.
• Ensure continuous development and enhancement of the existing AurumPay Mobile Money system backend.
2. Software Quality & Database Management
• Oversee backend development using Java, Spring Boot, and related libraries (Hibernate, Spring Security).
• Ensure all services meet security, performance, and compliance standards.
• Design and optimize Oracle databases; write complex SQL queries and manage database migrations.
3. API & Third-Party Integrations
• Build and support integrations using REST, SOAP, ISO 8583, and other industry-standard protocols.
• Integrate with mobile operators, digital wallets, EMIs, payment switches, and gateways.
4. System Design & Team Leadership
• Design scalable backend architectures and integration plans based on business needs.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to build resilient solutions.
• Provide technical guidance, code reviews, and mentorship to junior developers.
• Promote agile methodologies and CI/CD practices.

Job Requirements
Mandatory:
• Strong expertise in Java and Spring Boot (Spring MVC, Spring Data, Spring Security).
• Proven experience building REST/SOAP APIs and integrations using ISO 8583 and other industry protocols.
• Deep understanding of microservices architecture and full SDLC.
• Hands-on experience integrating with wallets, telecom operators, EMIs, or financial switches.
• Strong proficiency with Oracle databases (complex queries, indexing, performance tuning).
• Experience deploying applications on Oracle WebLogic Server or similar Java EE containers.
• Proficient with GitHub/GitLab and CI/CD pipelines.
• 5+ years of backend Java development experience in FinTech, payments, or technical integrations.
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field (Master’s is a plus).

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should submit their CV to following Email Address.
( jobs@aurumaf.com)

expiring_today.title: مدیر تکنالوژی معلوماتی - هلمند برښنا
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
کارمند بست متذکره مسوول پیشبرد وظایف ذیل میباشد

Duties and Responsibilities
نصب سرور/ نرم افزار ها و نظارت بر عملکرد ها و رفع مشکلات بخش های مربوطه
تشخیص منبع مشکلات عملیاتی، بشمول جنبه های نرم افزاری و سخت افزاری برای سیستم ها و سرور کمپیوتر
تهیه نسخه های کاپی سیستم ها و اسناد، ایجاد حسابات کمپیوتری برای کارمندان
رفع مشکلات عملکرد های شبکه های LAN/WAN اتصالات و مشکلات مربوط به شبکه ها
همکاری در اداره و نظارت منابع بشمول VPN فایروال سرور پراکسی و مسیرها
هماهنگی و تجدید نرم افزار و سخت افزار شبکه ها
همکاری در تحلیل و ارزیابی قراردادی های محصولات نرم افزاری و سخت افزاری با مطابقت به ضروریات
همکاری و هماهنگی فراگیری حصول اجرای محصولات قراردادی
انجام وظایف متخصص شبکه مدیریت روزمره اطلاعات عملکرد های شبکه
همکاری در ترتیب و توصیه استندرد های برای استفاده از منابع سیستم کمپیوتری
اجرای سایر وظایف محول شده

Job Requirements
لیسانس در رشته کمپیوتر ساینس
دو سال تجربه کاری در بخش مربوطه
دانستن پروسیجرها، میتود ها و وسایل مدرن اداری
بلدیت کامل با زبان های ملی کشور و آشنایی با زبان انګلیسی
مشاهده و رفع نواقص تخنیکی و عملیاتی
تحلیل و ارزیابی تجدید محصولات نرم افزاری و سخت افزاری
همکاری در ایجاد استندرد های برای منابع سیستم های کمپیوتری

Submission Guidelines
Dear Applicant,
Thank you for your interest in applying for the job, The qualified and interested applicants can fill the online application form through the following link:
Link for online Apply
http://hris.dabs.af/Recruit/Applicant/ApplicantApply/94CDE0C3-63DB-4BA7-892B-8A2874C10741
To ensure that your application is considered, please follow these submission guidelines:
1. Submit your application by the deadline specified as late applications will not be considered.
2. Fill out the application form completely and accordingly as incomplete form will not be considered. Make sure to provide all the necessary information, including your personal details, work experience, education and skills.
3. Provide accurate contact information as this will be used for all communications regarding your application.
4. Double-check your applications before submitting it to ensure that these are no errors or omissions.
5. Shortlisted candidates will be directly contacted for a written test or interview. If you’re not contacted within two or four weeks after the closing date, please know that your application has not been considered for the post.
Note: The internal employees of DABS are required to get the approval of their respective head of division and submit it along with application form, otherwise the application will be rejected.
We appreciate your interest in DABS and look forward to reviewing your application, if you have any questions contact us on this phone number:
TEL0202513694

expiring_soon.title: 2. Female Trainer – Digital Marketing, Social Media, Photography and Branding
expiring_soon.description:
About ACE/PPC
Premium Performance Consulting (PPC) is a specialized Afghan consulting firm providing monitoring, evaluation, third-party monitoring (TPM), independent assessments, verification services, research, data management, and quality assurance solutions for development and humanitarian programs across Afghanistan. PPC has supported a wide range of assignments for UN agencies, international organizations, NGOs, and government institutions, delivering evidence-based insights, performance measurement, beneficiary verification, and accountability services that strengthen program effectiveness and decision-making.
PPC serves as a strategic domain partner within the Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE) Ecosystem . Established in 2012, ACE is a leading Afghan consulting and development services organization with nationwide operations and regional offices across Afghanistan. ACE specializes in private sector development, business development services (BDS), value chain development, livelihoods, workforce development, capacity building, economic inclusion, research, and institutional strengthening, supporting governments, development partners, and private sector actors in achieving sustainable development outcomes.
The advertised position is with the Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE) and will contribute to ACE's portfolio of consulting and development assignments. Through the ACE Ecosystem partnership model, the position will benefit from the complementary expertise of PPC and other ecosystem partners, combining ACE's programmatic leadership and technical delivery capacity with PPC's strengths in monitoring, evaluation, verification, and quality assurance to deliver high-quality, evidence-driven development solutions across Afghanistan.
Interested applicants should submit:
Updated CV
Cover letter clearly mentioning the trainer position(s) applied for
Relevant sample training materials, portfolio, or evidence of similar assignments, if available
Contact details of two professional references

Job Descriptions
Afghanistan Center for Excellence (ACE), through the ACE/PPC Ecosystem, is implements capacity-building projects aimed at strengthening women-owned and women-led businesses in Afghanistan. The projects provide practical training and follow-up mentoring/coaching support to women entrepreneurs in key business development areas, including business registration, legal compliance, taxation, digital marketing, procurement readiness, access to finance, and business growth.
ACE/PPC Ecosystem is seeking qualified and experienced female trainers for the following thematic areas.
Purpose of the Position: The Trainer will deliver practical training and mentoring to women-owned and women-led businesses on digital marketing, social media use, product photography, branding, content development, and basic digital marketing planning.

Job Requirements
Main Training and Mentoring Areas
· Use of social media platforms for small business promotion.
· Basic digital tools for business visibility and customer engagement.
· Product photography using available/simple tools.
· Branding, messaging, and content development for women-owned businesses.
· Preparation of simple digital marketing plans and posting schedules.
Key Responsibilities
· Develop, review, and adapt training materials related to digital marketing, social media, photography, and branding.
· Prepare session plans, agendas, exercises, live demonstrations, and practical examples.
· Deliver interactive and practical training sessions to women entrepreneurs.
· Facilitate hands-on exercises on social media pages, content design, product photos, branding, and customer engagement.
· Conduct pre- and post-training assessments, where required.
· Provide practical templates and tools, including content calendars, simple brand guides, caption samples, and digital marketing plan templates.
· Provide follow-up mentoring/coaching to selected participants on improving their online presence and business visibility.
· Support participants in applying digital marketing practices to their own products and services.
· Document participant progress, key challenges, and success stories, where applicable.
· Coordinate with ACE/PPC Ecosystem project staff on logistics, attendance, documentation, and reporting.
· Prepare brief training and mentoring reports, including observations, participant feedback, challenges, and recommendations.
· Ensure all sessions are respectful, inclusive, culturally appropriate, and gender-sensitive.
Expected Deliverables
· Training agenda and session plan.
· Final/adapted training materials on digital marketing, social media, photography, and branding.
· Practical templates/tools, such as digital marketing plan, content calendar, branding checklist, and product photography checklist.
· Pre- and post-test tools, where required.
· Participant attendance lists.
· Training completion report.
· Mentoring/coaching session notes and participant progress updates.
· Photos/videos and other training evidence, as required.
Required Qualifications and Experience
· Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, ICT, Business Administration, Media, Design, Development Studies, or another relevant field. Master’s degree is preferred.
· Minimum 3–5 years of relevant experience in digital marketing, social media management, branding, photography, business development, entrepreneurship support, or MSME mentoring/coaching.
· Proven experience delivering training and/or coaching to women entrepreneurs, MSMEs, private sector actors, or business groups.
· Strong practical knowledge of social media platforms, digital tools, content development, product photography, and small business branding.
· Excellent facilitation, presentation, communication, and interpersonal skills.
· Fluency in Dari and/or Pashto is required; working knowledge of English is an advantage.
· Ability to travel to target provinces, if required.
· Previous experience with UN agencies, NGOs, consulting firms, or donor-funded projects is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified female candidates are invited to submit their applications to:
Email: business@pre-performance.com
Subject Line: Application – Female Trainer / [Mention Training Area]
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for written test, technical assessment, or interview.

Submission Email
business@pre-performance.com
Apply

details.Education: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field, such as project management, business administration, or social sciences.

expiring_soon.title: Graphic Designer
expiring_soon.description:
About Wadan Steel Company
About Wadan Steel Mill
Wadan Steel Mill is one of Afghanistan's leading steel manufacturers, committed to producing high-quality reinforcing steel bars that meet national and international quality standards. As part of our continued expansion, we are seeking an experienced, dynamic, and results-oriented Marketing Manager to lead our marketing initiatives, strengthen our market position, and drive sustainable business growth.
Why Join Wadan Steel Mill?
At Wadan Steel Mill, you will have the opportunity to contribute to one of Afghanistan’s leading industrial organizations and play a key role in supporting the country’s infrastructure development. We offer a professional working environment where innovation, integrity, teamwork, and continuous improvement are highly valued

Job Descriptions
Job Purpose
The Graphic Designer is responsible for developing creative and professional visual content that enhances Wadan Steel's brand identity and supports the company's marketing, sales, and corporate communication activities. The role ensures consistent branding across all print and digital platforms while promoting Wadan Steel's products, services, and corporate image.
Key Responsibilities
Edit and produce high-quality videos for digital, social media, and promotional platforms.
Trim, arrange, and enhance video footage by adding graphics, transitions, effects, music, and subtitles.
Design and produce high-quality marketing materials, including brochures, catalogs, product profiles, flyers, banners, billboards, signage, packaging, and corporate stationery.
Develop engaging digital content for the company's website, social media platforms, email campaigns, and online advertisements.
Create product visuals, technical datasheets, info-graphics, presentations, and promotional materials for Wadan Steel's products and projects.
Ensure all designs comply with the company's branding guidelines and maintain a consistent corporate identity.
Work closely with the Marketing, Sales, and Production departments to develop creative concepts that support business objectives and promotional campaigns.
Capture and edit photographs and videos of the company's facilities, production processes, products, projects, and events for marketing and documentation purposes.
Coordinate with printing houses, advertising agencies, media partners, and external suppliers to ensure timely and high-quality production of marketing materials.
Maintain and organize the company's digital asset library, including logos, templates, images, and design files.
Stay informed about design trends, digital marketing practices, and new creative technologies to improve marketing effectiveness.
Support corporate events, exhibitions, product launches, CSR activities, and other promotional initiatives through creative design and branding.
Perform any other marketing and graphic design duties assigned by the Marketing Manager.

Job Requirements
Minimum of 3 years of professional experience in graphic design, branding, or marketing communications. Experience in the manufacturing, construction materials, industrial, or steel sector is highly preferred. Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Fine Arts, Multimedia, Visual Communication, Marketing, or a related field
Advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and other graphic design software.
Working knowledge of Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar video editing software is an advantage.
Strong understanding of branding, typography, layout, color theory, and print production.
Creativity, attention to detail, and the ability to produce high-quality designs under tight deadlines.
Strong communication, teamwork, and organizational skills.
Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
Good command of English, Dari, and Pashto is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
How to Apply
Interested qualified candidates should submit their CVs with a cover letter explaining their motivation in applying for the job and highlighting their relevant skills and experience to the following email address.
Candidates must clearly write the Reference and Job Title in the subject of line otherwise your application will not be considered.
· Copies of relevant academic and professional qualifications
Application Deadline: July 16, 2026
Applications should be sent to:
Email: hr@wadansteel.com
+93707978068 or +93765328601

Submission Email
hr@wadansteel.com
Apply

expiring_soon.title: IT Technician (ISP)
expiring_soon.description:
About City Connect ICT Services
City Connect ICT Services was established on 08 May
2025 with the objective of providing high-quality Internet and ICT services
throughout Afghanistan. The company aims to contribute to the digital
transformation of Afghanistan by delivering reliable, secure, and affordable
connectivity solutions to residential, commercial, governmental, and
institutional customers.
The company is seeking renewal of its ICT License to
continue its operations and expand its services across additional provinces.
Through strategic partnerships with international connectivity providers such
as OmanTel and PTCL, City Connect ICT Services intends to deliver low-latency
and highly reliable Internet services to its customers.

Job Description
Job Summary
We are looking for a skilled and motivated IT Technician to join our team. The successful candidate will be responsible for installing new internet connections, troubleshooting customer technical issues, maintaining network equipment, and providing timely technical support to ensure high-quality internet service.
Key Responsibilities
Install new internet connections at customer locations.
Troubleshoot and resolve internet connectivity and network issues.
Configure, test, and maintain customer networking equipment.
visit Tower side for t.shoot/ installing a new access point.
Install, replace, collect, and manage network devices and accessories.
Perform preventive maintenance and ensure network reliability.
Report completed installations, maintenance, and collected devices.
Follow company technical standards and safety procedures.
Coordinate with the technical support team to resolve complex issues.

Job Requirements
Requirements
Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Networking, or a related field (preferred).
Practical experience in internet service installation and troubleshooting is an advantage.
Good understanding of networking fundamentals, including routers, switches, wireless devices, and wireless internet technologies.
Ability to diagnose and solve technical problems efficiently.
Good communication and customer service skills.
Ability to work in the field and travel to customer locations.
Honest, responsible, punctual, and able to work independently and as part of a team.
Preferred Skills
Knowledge of TCP/IP networking and router configuration.
Experience with wireless internet installations.
Familiarity with networking tools and testing equipment.

Submission Guidelines
Applicants meeting the above
requirements are requested to apply for this vacancy through email stated above
only.
Important Notes:
1. Please attach your Supporting documents, e.g. Certificates, HR letters, CV and Tazkira, etc. for further screening
purpose.
2. Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for
further assessment.

details.Contract Duration: Long term but after trial period

expiring_soon.title: Tech Lead / Full-Stack Architect.
expiring_soon.category: Information Technology, Management, Supply Chain, Communication, Accounting, IT
expiring_soon.description:
About Etimad Maihan group
Etimad Maihan Group is an Afghan-owned construction and engineering company with an established presence across Afghanistan, employing a team of 20 to 50 professionals across project management, engineering, civil works, and operations. Founded and led by Afghan nationals, the company has built its reputation through the successful delivery of residential, commercial, and infrastructure construction projects, working in compliance with Afghan Ministry of Urban Development and Housing standards and international quality benchmarks.
With a strong foundation in the Afghan construction sector, Etimad Maihan Group is now investing in its next strategic phase: the development of BuildPrice NSW, a technology platform being launched in Australia. BuildPrice NSW applies artificial intelligence to automate construction cost estimation — enabling clients to upload architectural drawings and receive an instant, itemised Bill of Quantities priced at current market rates. This platform is the first of its kind in the Australian construction market and represents Etimad Maihan Group's expansion from physical construction into construction technology.
The development team for BuildPrice NSW will be based in Afghanistan, working under the direct leadership of the Group's Director and reporting to the Australian operation. This arrangement reflects the Group's commitment to creating skilled technology employment in Afghanistan while delivering an internationally competitive product. Etimad Maihan Group offers its technology team members direct exposure to the Australian construction market, hands-on experience with current AI technologies including the Anthropic Claude API, and a genuine opportunity to grow with a company at the beginning of its international journey.
The Tech Lead / Full-Stack Architect role is the founding technical position within this division and represents a significant career opportunity for a highly qualified Afghan software engineer.
Mandatory
• Minimum 5 years of professional full-stack software development experience, with at least 2 years in a senior or lead capacity.
• Bachelor's degree (B.Sc.) in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a closely related technical discipline.
• Demonstrable experience having led or co-led the full build of a production web application — from architecture through to deployment. Portfolio or GitHub evidence required.
• Strong command of both frontend (React ecosystem) and backend (Node.js or Python) development — not a specialist in one at the expense of the other.
• Proven ability to write clean, documented, maintainable code that other developers can work with and extend.
• Professional proficiency in English — written and spoken — sufficient to communicate requirements, documentation, and technical decisions clearly with an Australian director.
Preferred
• 5+ years of experience (beyond the minimum) with increasing scope and seniority.
• Prior experience as a founding engineer or CTO equivalent at a startup or early-stage company.
• Demonstrable experience mentoring junior developers and conducting systematic code reviews.
• Experience working in an ISO 27001, SOC 2, or similar security-conscious engineering environment.

Job Descriptions
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
1. System Architecture & Technical Leadership
• Design and own the complete system architecture for all three platform components: customer portal, backend API, and internal ERP.
• Define technology standards, coding conventions, branching strategy, code review protocols, and deployment pipelines that all team members must follow.
• Produce and maintain architecture decision records (ADRs) for every major technical decision, including database schema design, API structure, third-party integrations, and AI pipeline design.
• Evaluate and select all third-party libraries, frameworks, SaaS tools, and cloud services — with rationale documented for each selection.
• Ensure all architectural decisions account for Australian data sovereignty, GDPR-adjacent obligations, and NCC/ABSA compliance where applicable.
2. Customer Portal (Frontend)
• Build and maintain the customer-facing web application using React 18+ and Next.js 14+ (App Router).
• Implement the drawing upload flow (PDF intake), real-time BoQ display, itemised pricing breakdown UI, scope adjustment interface, and job acceptance workflow.
• Ensure full mobile responsiveness, accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), and sub-3-second page load on Australian connections.
• Build the user authentication system (email/password + Google OAuth), account management, notification system, and document download (BoQ PDF export).
• Integrate the Stripe payment gateway for deposit collection upon job acceptance.
3. Backend API
• Design and implement a RESTful (and where appropriate, GraphQL) API layer using Node.js (Express or Fastify) or Python (FastAPI or Django REST Framework).
• Design the PostgreSQL database schema covering: users, projects, BoQ line items, materials, trade rates, job lifecycle, contractors, invoicing, and audit logs.
• Build the pricing engine — the core module that takes extracted BoQ line items and applies current NSW market rates, supplier pricing, and trade margin rules to produce the final quoted price.
• Implement Redis caching for high-frequency pricing lookups and session management.
• Build the webhook and event pipeline for job status updates, contractor notifications, payment confirmations, and reporting.
• Implement row-level security and role-based access control (RBAC) covering: customer, operations staff, contractor, admin, and super-admin roles.
4. AI / BoQ Automation Engine
• Design and implement the end-to-end PDF drawing ingestion pipeline — from raw PDF upload to structured BoQ output.
• Integrate the Claude API (Anthropic) for intelligent extraction of room schedules, finishes schedules, fixture schedules, and specification data from architectural drawing sets.
• Build the structured data normalisation layer that converts AI-extracted raw text into validated, schema-conformant BoQ line items.
• Implement confidence scoring, exception flagging, and human review workflows for AI outputs that fall below acceptable confidence thresholds.
• Build the feedback loop system — where corrections made by the operations team are used to continuously improve extraction accuracy over time.
• Optimise the pipeline for speed: target under 3 minutes from drawing upload to delivered BoQ for a standard residential drawing set.
5. Internal ERP (Operations Back-Office)
• Design and build the internal ERP used by the BuildPrice NSW operations team for day-to-day management of jobs, pricing, contractors, and reporting.
• Key ERP modules to deliver: Job Dashboard (all active jobs and their status), Pricing Database Manager (trade rates, material costs, supplier pricing), Contractor Management (profiles, licences, availability, performance ratings), BoQ Review & Override Interface, Financial Reporting (invoicing, GST, margin tracking), and Quality Control checklists.
• Build role-specific dashboards for: operations manager, pricing analyst, contractor coordinator, and executive/founder views.
6. Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
• Set up and maintain the full AWS infrastructure on ap-southeast-2 (Sydney): EC2 or ECS for compute, RDS PostgreSQL for the primary database, ElastiCache Redis, S3 for drawing storage, CloudFront CDN, Route 53 DNS, ACM for SSL, and Secrets Manager for credentials.
• Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions: automated testing, linting, build, staging deployment, and production deployment with rollback capability.
• Implement monitoring and alerting using CloudWatch and/or Datadog: uptime monitoring, performance metrics, error alerting, and cost monitoring.
• Implement automated backups, disaster recovery procedures, and document RPO/RTO targets.
7. Team Leadership
• Once the broader Phase 1 team is assembled, lead and mentor 6 additional specialists: Frontend Developer, Backend Developer, AI/BoQ Engineer, QA/Test Engineer, DevOps Engineer, and Project Manager.
• Conduct weekly technical stand-ups (10:00 AM Kabul time.), code reviews, sprint planning, and retrospectives.
• Define and enforce code quality standards, peer review requirements, and testing coverage targets across all team members.
• Be the primary technical liaison between the development team and the Founder — translating business requirements into technical specifications, and technical constraints into business impact.

Job Requirements
REQUIRED TECHNICAL SKILLS — MANDATORY
Candidates must demonstrate strong hands-on experience across all of the following. Applications without evidence of these skills will not be considered.
Frontend
React 18+
Next.js 14+ (App Router)
TypeScript
Tailwind CSS
REST API integration
State management (Zustand / Redux)
Responsive design
Web accessibility (WCAG)
PDF rendering in browser
Backend & Database
Node.js (Express / Fastify)
Python (FastAPI / Django)
PostgreSQL (advanced)
Database schema design
REST API design
JWT / OAuth2 / session auth
Redis (caching & queues)
File upload & storage (S3)
Background job queues
AI / Automation
Claude API / OpenAI API
PDF text extraction
Prompt engineering
Structured output (JSON schema)
Python data pipelines
pandas / openpyxl
Document parsing (PyMuPDF / pdfplumber)
Data validation & normalisation
Error handling & fallback logic
Cloud & DevOps
AWS (EC2 / RDS / S3 / CloudFront)
AWS (Route53 / ACM / IAM / VPC)
Docker & Docker Compose
GitHub Actions (CI/CD)
Linux / Bash scripting
Nginx / ALB load balancing
CloudWatch monitoring
Environment & secrets management
Terraform or CloudFormation
General Engineering
Git (branching & code review)
Agile / Scrum methodology
Unit & integration testing
Security best practices (OWASP)
API documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger)
Performance optimisation

Submission Guidelines
The Phase 1 team structure is as follows. The Tech Lead is the most senior technical person in the organisation and is accountable for all technical deliverables:
Tech Lead / Full-Stack Architect
This role — owns all architecture and technical delivery
Frontend Developer
Junior/mid — supervised by Tech Lead
Backend Developer
Junior/mid — supervised by Tech Lead
AI / BoQ Automation Engineer
Specialist — supervised by Tech Lead
QA / Test Engineer
Junior — supervised by Tech Lead
DevOps / Cloud Infrastructure
Specialist — supervised by Tech Lead
Project Manager / Product Owner
Co-ordination — reports to Founder, coordinates with Tech Lead
Customer Support & Data Entry
Operations — not technically supervised by Tech Lead

Submission Email
info@etimadmaihan.com
Apply

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking Technical Officer - ATM & POS
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Technical Officer – ATM & POS is primarily responsible for the end-to-end support, maintenance, and troubleshooting of Afghan United Bank’s ATM and POS infrastructure. This includes managing hardware and software operations, ensuring uptime and functionality, and coordinating with vendors for deployment, upgrades, and issue resolution. The role is vital to maintaining the reliability and effectiveness of self-service and point-of-sale banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Resolve difficult situations and malfunction of ATMs/POS effectively by analyzing the situation and identifying potential solutions and ensuring a high level of customer satisfaction.
· Oversee technical testing and implementation of ATMs and POS.
· Maintain of all communicational and networking issues related to ATM/POS
· Mobile Money
· Provide first-level technical support for ATMs, POS terminals, Mobile Banking, Internet Banking, and E-Commerce Gateway services.
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Coordinate with the switch vendor and third-party service providers for system upgrades, configurations, and incident management.
· Support onboarding and technical setup of POS merchants and E-Commerce merchants, including configuration and testing.
· Assist in testing and implementation of new digital banking features, services, and systems.
· Maintain accurate logs and documentation of technical activities, incidents, and changes.
· Ensure timely follow-up and escalation of unresolved issues to appropriate teams or vendors.
· Collaborate with internal departments to resolve customer-facing technical issues and contribute to service improvement.
· Adhere to internal IT, cybersecurity, and compliance standards for all supported platforms.
Participate in business continuity and contingency support processes for digital systems.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or a related technical field.
Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in ATM and/or POS maintenance and support, preferably in a banking or financial environment.
Strong knowledge of ATM and POS hardware components, software configurations, and troubleshooting.
Familiarity with ATM switch systems and integration protocols.
Understanding of network connectivity and remote management tools.
Ability to manage vendor coordination and service level monitoring.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number (AUB/EA/VA/026-029) in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates who have completed the requirements of the vacancy will be called for further selection process.

tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.
Requires quick work execution, competent English skills, honesty and reliability, and extensive knowledge or connections in Baghlan Province.

Duties and Responsibilities
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.

Job Requirements
Residing in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan; possessing basic English writing and communication skills; preference will be given to candidates with relevant government, military, or investigator experience; male candidates preferred

Submission Guidelines
Please submit your English resume on this website. Name your resume with your name and occupation. The resume should include your phone number, education, and detailed work experience (specifying position, company name, and responsibilities). Please update your resume regularly. Company staff will contact you via email; please check your inbox.
